title: Paraffin section tissue preparation
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"cde68","text":"This protocol describes the procedure used by the Seifert Lab to prepare paraffin-embedded tissue sections.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: For each sample, prepare a Eppendorf tubes 1.5 mL uncolored Eppendorf Catalog #022363204 with Epredia 10% Neutral Buffered Formalin Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #5701
Harvest tissue from animal and immerse in 10% NBF in prepared tube
Incubate Overnight at 4 °C on a rocker (16-18 hr fix)
Drain and repeat steps 5 and 6 two more times for a total of 3 washes
Drain PBS and add 70% Ethanol Contributed by users
Drain and repeat two more times for a total of 3 washes
After third wash, drain and replace with fresh 70% Ethanol
Store at 4 °C until ready for processing

Process for Formula R paraffin Leica Biosystems Catalog #3801450 embedding using a Histos 5 (Tissue processor, Milestone, 61577, https://www.milestonemedsrl.com/us/products/tissue-processing/?_gl=1*18i3dwh*_up*MQ..*_gs*MQ..&gclid=EAIaIQobChMIke623eqTigMVtszCBB3u3RJ2EAAYASAAEgJ_p_D_BwE&gclsrc=aw.ds )
creator: Ashley Seifert
